question:
या प्रश्नाचे भाषांतर करा:
राज्यनिहाय सूर्यफुलांच्या सरासरी उत्पन्न आणि एकूण उत्पादन खंडांचे विभाजन द्या, राज्यांच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमानुसार लावलेले.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T2.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.state_name,
       AVG(o.sunflower_yield_kg_per_ha) AS average_sunflower_yield,
       SUM(o.sunflower_production_1000tons) AS total_sunflower_production
FROM dim_geography d
JOIN fact_oilseeds_sunflower o ON d.geography_id = o.geography_id
GROUP BY d.state_name
ORDER BY d.state_name;
raw_output:
SELECT d.state_name,
       AVG(o.sunflower_yield_kg_per_ha) AS average_sunflower_yield,
       SUM(o.sunflower_production_1000tons) AS total_sunflower_production
FROM dim_geography d
JOIN fact_oilseeds_sunflower o ON d.geography_id = o.geography_id
GROUP BY d.state_name
ORDER BY d.state_name;

question: १९७० सालातील छत्तीसगढ राज्यातील मूगफळी आणि सोयाबीनच्या उत्पादनाचा आणि सरासरी उत्पन्नाचा जिल्हावार सारांश द्या, फक्त मूगफळी उत्पादन नोंदवलेल्या जिल्ह्यांवर लक्ष केंद्रित करून आणि त्यांना सोयाबीन उत्पादनानुसार क्रमांक द्या.

    dg.dist_name,
    SUM(fom.groundnut_production_1000tons) AS total_groundnut_production,

    SUM(fom.soyabean_production_1000tons) AS total_soyabean_production,
    AVG(fom.soyabean_yield_kg_per_ha) AS avg_soyabean_yield,

ORDER BY soyabean_production_rank;
